chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 306 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 15.05.2024 Mr. Rahib Islam Nabi Malano, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that he has filed an application before Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Rohri (respondent No.5) for demarcation of land, which is available at page 17, but no decision has been made. Learned AAG Sindh undertakes that decision on his application would be made within one month and communicated to the petitioner accordingly, and the copy of which shall be submitted before this Court for a perusal. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
